commands.payload:
Aspose.Imaging Image Merge Micro Application 23.12.0.0
Copyright © 2010-2023 Aspose Pty. Ltd

  -p, --project    Path to the project project for the addition of the reference
                   to the MicroApps API.

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.

result.stderr:
Aspose.Imaging Image Merge Micro Application 23.12.0.0
Copyright © 2010-2023 Aspose Pty. Ltd

  -i, --input               Required. Input images paths or urls.

  -o, --output              Required. Path to the merged image. By default it's
                            created in Application Data folder

  -f, --format              (Default: jpg) Output image format. Jpeg is default
                            value

  -d, --direction           (Default: Horizontal) Merge direction. Allowed
                            values : Horizontal, Vertical. Default value is
                            horizontal.

  -a, --adjustment          (Default: None) Merge adjustment type. Allowed
                            values : None, Smallest, Biggest. Default value is
                            None.

  -C, --max-columns         (Default: -1) Maximal amount of columns for grid
                            layout.

  -R, --max-rows            (Default: -1) Maximal amount of rows for grid
                            layout.

  -W, --max-width           (Default: -1) Maximal width of the resulting image
                            in pixels.

  -H, --max-height          (Default: -1) Maximal height of the resulting image
                            in pixels.

  -b, --background-color    (Default: White) The background color of resulting
                            image. Could be set in using
                            https://reference.aspose.com/imaging/net/aspose.imag
                            ing/color/. Otherwise HTML HEX code expressions are
                            supported (#RRGGBB, #RGB, #RRGGBBAA, #RGBA), as well
                            as special color - transparent.

  -m, --margin-size         (Default: 0) Set margin size in pixels

  -l, --license             Path to Aspose.Imaging .NET license file.

  -v, --verbose             (Default: false) Verbose output.

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.

staticCommands.name: add
staticCommands.description: Add reference to the MicroApps aPI to your project.

options.description: Path to the project project for the addition of the reference to the MicroApps API.
Path to the merged image. By default it's created in Application Data folder
Merge adjustment type. Allowed values : None, Smallest, Biggest. Default value is None.

The background color of resulting image. Could be set in using https://reference.aspose.com/imaging/net/aspose.imaging/color/. Otherwise HTML HEX code expressions are supported (#RRGGBB, #RGB, #RRGGBBAA, #RGBA), as well as special color - transparent.
Merge direction. Allowed values : Horizontal, Vertical. Default value is horizontal.
Output image format. Jpeg is default value
Maximal amount of columns for grid layout.
Maximal height of the resulting image in pixels.
Maximal amount of rows for grid layout.
Maximal width of the resulting image in pixels.
